title: Savory Dutch Rice Bowl
description: A fresh, low-carb Dutch inspired bowl that combines sushi rice, smoked bonito flakes, and crisp roasted veggies for a comforting sick-day meal.
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
Combine the rinsed rice, water, and 1/2 tsp salt in a saucepan, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Remove the pot from heat, let the rice stand for 10 minutes, then fluff with a fork and stir in the rice vinegar, sugar, and sesame oil.
While the rice rests, toss the sliced cucumber and shredded carrots with a pinch of salt, let them sit for 5 minutes, then squeeze out excess moisture.
Blanch the edamame in salted boiling water for 2 minutes, then shock in ice water to stop cooking.
In a bowl, arrange a bed of warm sushi rice, top with the seasoned veggies, edamame, and a generous scatter of smoked bonito flakes.
Drizzle soy sauce over the bowl and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds on top.
Serve immediately, optionally adding a squeeze of lemon or a dash of sriracha for extra zing.
